backstory.original: Born frail yet gifted with an uncanny aptitude for magic, Raistlin Majere is the Sorcery to his older twin brother Caramon's Sword. The youngest wizard ever to attempt the Test of High Sorcery, Raistlin was forever changed, marked by white hair, golden skin, and hourglass eyes that see the accelerated passage of time. Together with his fellow Heroes of the Lance, Raistlin wields his formidable arcane talents against Takhisis, the Dragon Queen.
backstory.display: 雷斯林·马哲理天生体弱，却拥有非凡的魔法天赋，不同于他那习剑的孪生哥哥卡拉蒙，他走上了学习魔法的道路。作为有史以来参加高魔测试的最年轻法师，雷斯林的模样自此彻底改变了——白发、金肤，以及能够看到时间加速流逝的沙漏之眼，成为了他的标志。和其他“长枪英雄”勇士一起，雷斯林运用他强大的奥术天赋对抗龙女王塔克西丝。

description.original: Raistlin fires a number of magic missiles at the toughest enemies.
description.display: 雷斯林向最强硬的敌人发射多枚魔法飞弹。

longDescription.original: Raistlin fires a number of magic missiles at the toughest enemies.
longDescription.display: 雷斯林向最强硬的敌人发射多枚魔法飞弹。

description.original: Raistlin envelops enemies with a deadly ring of fire.
description.display: 雷斯林用一个致命的火环将敌人包围起来。

longDescription.original: Raistlin envelops enemies with a deadly ring of fire, dealing one ultimate hit every second to enemies in the area.
longDescription.display: 雷斯林用一个致命的火环将敌人包围起来，每秒对该区域中的敌人造成一次杀招命中。

description.desc: Raistlin increases his damage by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion that is not adjacent to him, stacking multiplicatively.
每有一位勇士不与雷斯林相邻，雷斯林会使自己的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Raistlin increases his damage for each Champion that is not next to him.
tipText.display: 每有一位勇士不与雷斯林相邻，雷斯林会使自己的伤害提高。

description.desc: For each positional formation ability affecting Raistlin, he gains Intensity stacks based on how few other Champions are also affected by the same ability. He gains one stack if there are three other Champions affected, two if there are two other Champions affected, three if there is only one other Champion affected, and four if Raistlin is the only Champion affected. The effect of Prodigy of High Sorcery is increased by $amount% for each Intensity stack Raistlin has, stacking multiplicatively.
每有一项影响雷斯林的位置阵型技能，他会根据受同一项技能影响的其他勇士数量获得“强烈”堆叠层数。如果有三位其他勇士受影响，他会获得一层堆叠层数，如果有两位其他勇士受影响，他会获得两层，如果有一位其他勇士受影响，他会获得三层，如果他是唯一受影响的勇士，他会获得四层。雷斯林每拥有一层“强烈”堆叠层数，“高魔奇才”的效果提升 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Raistlin's damage is increased for each positional buff he receives that only affects a few other Champions in the formation.
tipText.display: 雷斯林每受到一项只作用于阵型中少数其他勇士的增益影响，他的伤害会提高。

description.desc: When Raistlin attacks and is at or above $health_percent_threshold% of his max health, he takes $damage_percent% of his max health as damage but deals $amount% more damage with his attack.
当雷斯林发动攻击，并且生命值大于等于他最大生命值的 $health_percent_threshold% 时，他会受到相当于他最大生命值 $damage_percent% 的伤害，但他的攻击伤害提高 $amount%。
Raistlin increases the effect of Prodigy of High Sorcery by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Good Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位善良勇士，雷斯林会使“高魔奇才”的效果提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Heroes are reluctantly forged in the crucible of war.
specializationDescription.display: 英雄都是在战争的磨难中不情愿地被锻炼出来的。

description.desc: Raistlin increases the effect of Prodigy of High Sorcery by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a Melee or Ranged base attack, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位近战或远程基本攻击的勇士，雷斯林会使“高魔奇才”的效果提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Raistlin stands apart among the Heroes of the Lance as the only true practitioner of High Sorcery.
specializationDescription.display: 雷斯林在“长枪英雄”中独树一帜，是唯一真正的高等魔法修习者。

description.desc: Raistlin increases the effect of Prodigy of High Sorcery by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Tanking Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位坦克型勇士，雷斯林会使“高魔奇才”的效果提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: When protected by his allies, Raistlin excels at facing the forces of Takhisis.
specializationDescription.display: 在盟友的保护下，雷斯林在面对塔克西丝的部队时表现出色。

description.desc: Other Champions' healing effects on Raistlin are reduced by $(amount___2)%. Whenever any other Champion in the formation uses an ultimate attack, Raistlin drinks a cup of tea after his next attack, healing himself for $health_percent_per_ultimate% of his max health for each ultimate that was used, stacking additively.
其他勇士对雷斯林的治疗效果降低 $(amount___2)%。每当阵型中的任意其他勇士使用杀招攻击时，雷斯林会在下一次攻击后会喝一杯茶，对自己进行治疗，每有勇士使用了一次杀招，他会恢复他最大生命值的 $health_percent_per_ultimate%，以加算方式堆叠。

While fighting in an area with an incomplete quest, Raistlin casts Fireball at enemies in the next area after every fourth attack. This causes those enemies to spawn with missing health equal to $damage_per_stack% of their max health, stacking additively up to five times.
当雷斯林在一个有未完成任务的区域内战斗时，他每发动四次攻击后会对下个区域内的敌人施放火球。这会导致这些敌人刷新时缺少相当于他们最大生命值 $damage_per_stack% 的生命值，以加算方式堆叠。

description.original: That pasty-faced, skinny magician. He's more than half charlatan himself. ~Flint
description.display: 那个脸色苍白，瘦骨嶙峋的法师。他就是个彻头彻尾的骗子。~弗林特

description.original: I think the young man was a better magician than you give him credit for. ~Tanis
description.display: 我认为那个年轻人是一位很棒的魔法师，水平没你评价得那么差。~塔尼斯

description.original: Touch me not! I am magi! ~Raistlin
description.display: 别碰我！我是法师！~雷斯林

effects.description: Raistlin fires an additional magic missile with his base attack

description.original: Kalith karan, tobaniskar! ~Raistlin
description.display: 卡利斯卡兰，托巴尼斯卡！~雷斯林

effects.description: Raistlin fires two additional magic missiles with his base attack

description.original: Power is what I have long sought - and still seek. ~Raistlin
description.display: 我长久以来一直在追求力量——如今也依然在求索。~雷斯林

description.original: I saw him battle powerful mages with only a few simple spells. ~Caramon
description.display: 我见过他只用一些简单的法术与强大的法师战斗。~卡拉蒙

description.original: Caramon, there's a dark side to your brother, and Tanis has seen it. ~Sturm
description.display: 卡拉蒙，你的弟弟有着阴暗的一面，塔尼斯已经看出来了。~斯特姆

description.original: I can cast a spell on the door, but it will weaken me greatly. ~Raistlin
description.display: 我可以对那扇门施法，但那会让我大大变弱。~雷斯林

description.original: The spell... drained me... I must rest... ~Raistlin
description.display: 那法术……耗尽了我的力量……我得休息一下……~雷斯林

description.original: Stand back. I have strength for one more spell. ~Raistlin
description.display: 退下。我还有力量再施一次法术。~雷斯林

effects.description: Increases the health threshold of Debilitating Magic to trigger when Raistlin is above 80% health

description.original: The spell worked, but I did not believe it would drain me like this. ~Raistlin
description.display: 这法术奏效了，但我没想到它会如此消耗我的力量。~雷斯林

effects.description: Decreases the damage amount of Debilitating Magic to 0.5%

description.original: The staff will not heal me, Tanis. Do not waste it on me. ~Raistlin
description.display: 那法杖治不好我的，塔尼斯。别把它浪费在我身上。~雷斯林

effects.description: Increases the healing per ultimate of Herbalism to 4%

description.original: He's got to have that stuff he drinks! I've never seen him this bad. ~Caramon
description.display: 他非得喝他平时常喝的那玩意才行！我从没见过他的状态这么糟糕。~卡拉蒙

effects.description: Decreases the heal reduction of Herbalism to 25%

description.original: Now is the time for the casting of the fireball, Old One. ~Raistlin
description.display: 现在是时候施放火球了，旧日支配者。~雷斯林

effects.description: Increases the damage per fireball of Flames of High Sorcery to 15% of the enemy's max health.

description.original: Ah, but who chose us? And for what purpose? Consider that, Tanis! ~Raistlin
description.display: 啊，但是谁选择了我们？又是出于什么目的？想想吧，塔尼斯！~雷斯林

effects.description: Increases the effect of Raistlin's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: Was it worth it? ~Tanis
description.display: 那值得吗？~塔尼斯

effects.description: Increases the effect of Raistlin's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: I am here, my brother. ~Raistlin
description.display: 我来了，我的兄弟。~雷斯林

effects.description: Increases the effect of Raistlin's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: As was foretold, he is the master of both present and past. ~Fizban
description.display: 正如预言的那样，他成为了现在与过去之主。~费资本

effects.description: Increases the Base DPS of Raistlin by $amount% and changes his alignment to Chaotic Evil.

name.original: Raistlin, Master of Past and Present
name.display: 过去与现在之主雷斯林

description.original: My brother and I planned a secret journey.
description.display: 我和我兄弟曾计划过一场秘密之旅。

description.original: I had been selected to take the Test. You can imagine my pride.
description.display: 我被选中去参加测试。你能想象我有多骄傲。

description.original: We traveled to the secret place, the Towers of High Sorcery.
description.display: 我们前往秘密之地——高魔之塔。

description.original: There I passed the test. And there I nearly died!
description.display: 在那里，我通过了测试。也是在那里，我差点丢了性命！

description.original: While you and my brother played with wooden swords, I spent my time in study.
description.display: 当你和我哥哥在玩木剑时，我把时间花在了学习上。

name.display: 西奥博尔德学院教科书

description.original: During the Cataclysm, the city of Xak Tsaroth was cast down the side of a cliff.
description.display: 在大灾变期间，扎克萨罗思城被抛下了悬崖。

description.original: My brother, there is something you must bring me from the dragon's lair.
description.display: 兄弟，有一件东西你必须从龙穴带回来给我。

name.display: 费斯坦但提勒斯的魔法书

description.original: It is one of the mage's early books. One he had when he was very young indeed.
description.display: 这是这位法师其中一本早期的书。是他非常年轻时拥有的一本书。

description.original: When I awoke, my skin had turned this color - a mark of my suffering.
description.display: 当我醒来时，我的皮肤已经变成了这颜色——这是我痛苦的印记。

description.original: My body and health are irretrievably shattered. And my eyes!
description.display: 我的身体和健康受到了不可挽回的摧残，还有我的眼睛！

description.original: I see through hourglass pupils. I see time, as it affects all things.
description.display: 我透过沙漏般的瞳孔视物。我能看见时间，看见它如何影响万物。

description.original: I see you dying, slowly, by inches. And so I see every living thing.
description.display: 我能看见你一点一点地慢慢死去。一切活物生命的流逝我都能看见。

description.original: I must replenish the herbs that heal my cough.
description.display: 我得补充治疗我咳嗽的草药了。

description.original: My body was my sacrifice for my magic. This damage is permanent.
description.display: 我把我的身体献祭给了我的魔法。这种损伤是永久性的。

description.original: I am much better. Leave me to my concoction.
description.display: 我好多了。你不用管我，让我专心调制我的药剂吧。

description.original: My spell components are secret.
description.display: 我的法术材料是秘密。

description.original: You have never heard of him, yet he was one of the greatest of my order.
description.display: 你从未听说过他，但他是我所属法师团中最伟大的人之一。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Raistlin's Specializations by $(amount)%.

description.original: His name was Fistandantilus. Ask me no more! You are as bad as the others!
description.display: 他的名字叫费斯坦但提勒斯。别再问了！你跟其他人一样坏！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Raistlin's Specializations by $(amount)%.

name.display: 费斯坦但提勒斯的血石

description.original: It is valuable to me. I must have it! I must!
description.display: 它对我来说很宝贵。我必须拥有它！必须！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Raistlin's Specializations by $(amount)%.

description.original: None of us will come out of Silvanesti unscathed, if we come out at all.
description.display: 即使我们能走出西瓦那斯提，也没人能毫发无伤地走出来。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Raistlin's Specializations by $(amount)%.

description.original: Pound this in a cup and add water, then stir and drink. Ignore the smell.
description.display: 把这个放进杯子里捣碎，加点水搅匀喝了。别在意那味道。

description.original: The halcyon days I spent in mimicry of a simple illusionist are long gone.
description.display: 我模仿平凡幻术师的那段安逸日子早已成为过去了。

description.original: Don't do it, my brother. Come no closer.
description.display: 别那样做，兄弟。别再过来。

description.original: Par-Salian told me the day would come when my strength would shape the world!
description.display: 帕萨里安曾告诉我，总有一天我的力量会改变世界！

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Human Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a INT score of 15 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Magic Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Born frail yet gifted with an uncanny aptitude for magic, Raistlin Majere is the Sorcery to his older twin brother Caramon's Sword. The youngest wizard ever to attempt the Test of High Sorcery, Raistlin was forever changed, marked by white hair, golden skin, and hourglass eyes that see the accelerated passage of time. Together with his fellow Heroes of the Lance, Raistlin wields his formidable arcane talents against Takhisis, the Dragon Queen.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Raistlin is a DPS Champion who excels when positioned away from the rest of the formation. His damage grows when positional formation abilities focus on just him and a small number of other Champions, and he'll periodically toss a fireball at the next area, resulting in enemies being softened up before the party arrives.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 雷斯林·马哲理天生体弱，却拥有非凡的魔法天赋，不同于他那习剑的孪生哥哥卡拉蒙，他走上了学习魔法的道路。作为有史以来参加高魔测试的最年轻法师，雷斯林的模样自此彻底改变了——白发、金肤，以及能够看到时间加速流逝的沙漏之眼，成为了他的标志。和其他“长枪英雄”勇士一起，雷斯林运用他强大的奥术天赋对抗龙女王塔克西丝。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 雷斯林是一位伤害输出勇士，在远离阵型其他勇士时表现尤为出色。当位置阵型技能仅作用于他和少数其他勇士时，他的伤害会提高，而且他会每隔一段时间向下一个区域投掷火球，在探险队到达前削弱敌人。

original.name: Magic Missile
original.description: Raistlin fires a number of magic missiles at the toughest enemies.
original.long_description: Raistlin fires a number of magic missiles at the toughest enemies.

display.name: 魔法飞弹
display.description: 雷斯林向最强硬的敌人发射多枚魔法飞弹。
display.long_description: 雷斯林向最强硬的敌人发射多枚魔法飞弹。

original.name: Raistlin's Wheel of Flame
original.description: Raistlin envelops enemies with a deadly ring of fire.
original.long_description: Raistlin envelops enemies with a deadly ring of fire, dealing one ultimate hit every second to enemies in the area.

display.name: 雷斯林的火焰之轮
display.description: 雷斯林用一个致命的火环将敌人包围起来。
display.long_description: 雷斯林用一个致命的火环将敌人包围起来，每秒对该区域中的敌人造成一次杀招命中。

display.name: 专家

effects.description: Increases the healing per ultimate of Herbalism to 4%

display.name: 自然疗法
display.description: 那法杖治不好我的，塔尼斯。别把它浪费在我身上。~雷斯林

effects.description: 使“本草学”的每次杀招治疗量提升至 4%

original.name: Natural Panacea
original.description: He's got to have that stuff he drinks! I've never seen him this bad. ~Caramon

effects.description: Decreases the heal reduction of Herbalism to 25%

display.name: 天然神药
display.description: 他非得喝他平时常喝的那玩意才行！我从没见过他的状态这么糟糕。~卡拉蒙

effects.description: 使“本草学”的治疗减少量降低至 25%

original.name: Old One's Flame
original.description: Now is the time for the casting of the fireball, Old One. ~Raistlin

effects.description: Increases the damage per fireball of Flames of High Sorcery to 15% of the enemy's max health.

display.name: 旧日支配者之火
display.description: 现在是时候施放火球了，旧日支配者。~雷斯林

effects.description: 使“高魔之火”的每个火球伤害提高至敌人最大生命值的 15%

original.name: Questioning Mage
original.description: Ah, but who chose us? And for what purpose? Consider that, Tanis! ~Raistlin

effects.description: Increases the effect of Raistlin's Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 爱探问的法师
display.description: 啊，但是谁选择了我们？又是出于什么目的？想想吧，塔尼斯！~雷斯林

effects.description: 使雷斯林的专精效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Desperate Mage
original.description: Was it worth it? ~Tanis

effects.description: Increases the effect of Raistlin's Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 不顾一切的法师
display.description: 那值得吗？~塔尼斯

effects.description: 使雷斯林的专精效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Timely Mage
original.description: I am here, my brother. ~Raistlin

effects.description: Increases the effect of Raistlin's Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 及时的法师
display.description: 我来了，我的兄弟。~雷斯林

effects.description: 使雷斯林的专精效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Fate Foretold
original.description: As was foretold, he is the master of both present and past. ~Fizban

effects.description: Increases the Base DPS of Raistlin by $amount% and changes his alignment to Chaotic Evil.

display.name: 预言的命运
display.description: 正如预言的那样，他成为了现在与过去之主。~费资本

effects.description: 使雷斯林的基础每秒伤害输出提高 $amount%，并将他的阵营改为混乱邪恶。

original.name: Raistlin, Master of Past and Present

display.name: 过去与现在之主雷斯林

original.name: Staff of Magius
original.description: We traveled to the secret place, the Towers of High Sorcery.

display.name: 玛济斯法杖
display.description: 我们前往秘密之地——高魔之塔。

original.name: Simple Staff
original.description: My brother and I planned a secret journey.

display.name: 简单法杖
display.description: 我和我兄弟曾计划过一场秘密之旅。

original.name: Apprentice Staff
original.description: I had been selected to take the Test. You can imagine my pride.

display.name: 学徒法杖
display.description: 我被选中去参加测试。你能想象我有多骄傲。

original.name: Staff of Magius Alight
original.description: There I passed the test. And there I nearly died!

display.name: 燃烧着的玛济斯法杖
display.description: 在那里，我通过了测试。也是在那里，我差点丢了性命！

original.name: Discarded Book
original.description: While you and my brother played with wooden swords, I spent my time in study.

display.name: 被丢弃的书籍
display.description: 当你和我哥哥在玩木剑时，我把时间花在了学习上。

original.name: Theobald's Academy Textbook
original.description: During the Cataclysm, the city of Xak Tsaroth was cast down the side of a cliff.

display.name: 西奥博尔德学院教科书
display.description: 在大灾变期间，扎克萨罗思城被抛下了悬崖。

original.name: Raistlin's Spellbook
original.description: My brother, there is something you must bring me from the dragon's lair.

display.name: 雷斯林的魔法书
display.description: 兄弟，有一件东西你必须从龙穴带回来给我。

original.name: Spellbooks of Fistandantilus
original.description: It is one of the mage's early books. One he had when he was very young indeed.

display.name: 费斯坦但提勒斯的魔法书
display.description: 这是这位法师其中一本早期的书。是他非常年轻时拥有的一本书。

original.name: Common Robes
original.description: When I awoke, my skin had turned this color - a mark of my suffering.

display.name: 普通长袍
display.description: 当我醒来时，我的皮肤已经变成了这颜色——这是我痛苦的印记。

original.name: White Robes of Solinari
original.description: My body and health are irretrievably shattered. And my eyes!

display.name: 索林那瑞的白袍
display.description: 我的身体和健康受到了不可挽回的摧残，还有我的眼睛！

original.name: Red Robes of Lunitari
original.description: I see through hourglass pupils. I see time, as it affects all things.

display.name: 努林塔瑞的红袍
display.description: 我透过沙漏般的瞳孔视物。我能看见时间，看见它如何影响万物。

original.name: Black Robes of Nuitari
original.description: I see you dying, slowly, by inches. And so I see every living thing.

display.name: 努塔瑞的黑袍
display.description: 我能看见你一点一点地慢慢死去。一切活物生命的流逝我都能看见。

original.name: Withered Herbs
original.description: I must replenish the herbs that heal my cough.

display.name: 枯萎的草药
display.description: 我得补充治疗我咳嗽的草药了。

original.name: Medicinal Herbs
original.description: My body was my sacrifice for my magic. This damage is permanent.

display.name: 药材
display.description: 我把我的身体献祭给了我的魔法。这种损伤是永久性的。

original.name: Raistlin's Tea
original.description: I am much better. Leave me to my concoction.

display.name: 雷斯林的茶
display.description: 我好多了。你不用管我，让我专心调制我的药剂吧。

original.name: Mysterious Reagents
original.description: My spell components are secret.

display.name: 神秘的药剂材料
display.description: 我的法术材料是秘密。

original.name: Unidentified Stone
original.description: You have never heard of him, yet he was one of the greatest of my order.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Raistlin's Specializations by $(amount)%.

display.name: 不明石头
display.description: 你从未听说过他，但他是我所属法师团中最伟大的人之一。

effects.description: 使雷斯林的专精效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Fake Bloodstone
original.description: His name was Fistandantilus. Ask me no more! You are as bad as the others!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Raistlin's Specializations by $(amount)%.

display.name: 假的血石
display.description: 他的名字叫费斯坦但提勒斯。别再问了！你跟其他人一样坏！

effects.description: 使雷斯林的专精效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Bloodstone of Fistandantilus
original.description: It is valuable to me. I must have it! I must!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Raistlin's Specializations by $(amount)%.

display.name: 费斯坦但提勒斯的血石
display.description: 它对我来说很宝贵。我必须拥有它！必须！

effects.description: 使雷斯林的专精效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Dragon Orb of Istar
original.description: None of us will come out of Silvanesti unscathed, if we come out at all.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Raistlin's Specializations by $(amount)%.

display.name: 伊斯塔龙珠
display.description: 即使我们能走出西瓦那斯提，也没人能毫发无伤地走出来。

effects.description: 使雷斯林的专精效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Powdered Herbs
original.description: Pound this in a cup and add water, then stir and drink. Ignore the smell.

display.name: 被碾成粉的草药
display.description: 把这个放进杯子里捣碎，加点水搅匀喝了。别在意那味道。

original.name: Flashpowder
original.description: The halcyon days I spent in mimicry of a simple illusionist are long gone.

display.name: 闪光粉
display.description: 我模仿平凡幻术师的那段安逸日子早已成为过去了。

original.name: Dagger of Magius
original.description: Don't do it, my brother. Come no closer.

display.name: 玛济斯的匕首
display.description: 别那样做，兄弟。别再过来。

original.name: Spellbook of Magius
original.description: Par-Salian told me the day would come when my strength would shape the world!

display.name: 玛济斯的魔法书
display.description: 帕萨里安曾告诉我，总有一天我的力量会改变世界！

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
使所有男性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Human Champions by $(amount)%
使所有人类勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有智力大于等于 15 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a INT score of 15 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位智力大于等于 15 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%

使所有魔法勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
